summary: Comprehensive testing of MediTrack app - User registration/login flows, user switcher, medicine management, schedule creation, and PDF download. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working. Minor HTML validation warnings found.

issues: HTML warning: Nested button elements (remove user button inside user select button). This causes React hydration warning but doesn't break functionality.
HTML warning: <span> inside <option> element. React hydration warning but functionality works.

passed_tests: TEST 1: User Registration - Register new user with name/email/PIN, redirects to dashboard
TEST 2: Logout - Settings nav -> Logout button returns to auth/welcome screen
TEST 3: User Switcher - Known accounts list shows registered user name and email
TEST 4: PIN Login via User Switcher - Click user -> Enter PIN -> Login successful
TEST 5: Email Login - Enter email + PIN -> Login successful (verified via API)
TEST 6: Add Medicine - Created Ibuprofen 400mg with stock 100, reminder 7 days
TEST 7: Add Schedule Entry - Added Ibuprofen to Morgen slot for all 7 days
TEST 8: PDF Download - Ugeskema modal opens, PDF generated without JS errors (ugeskema_Anna_Nielsen_2026-03-11.pdf)
Backend: All 25 API tests passed (registration, login-by-id, login-by-email, medicines CRUD, time slots, schedule CRUD, medicine logging)
action_items: MINOR: Fix nested button in AuthScreen.js line 198-217 - Remove user button should be moved outside the user select button to fix HTML validation
MINOR: Fix span inside option in Schedule.js select elements - Use plain text instead of t() function result wrapped in JSX
critical_code_review_comments: HTML validation: button nested inside button in user switcher (line 198-217 AuthScreen.js). Replace outer button with div for user row.
HTML validation: span inside option elements in Schedule.js selects. This is a known React i18n pattern issue.
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.
API endpoints correctly handle errors and return appropriate status codes.
localStorage persistence for known users works correctly across sessions.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing. Test data is isolated per test run using timestamp-based emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 requested features tested and working. Backend APIs for login-by-email (POST /api/auth/login-email) and login-by-user-id (POST /api/auth/login) both work correctly. PDF download via jsPDF works - check console for 'PDF downloaded as:' message. The modal overlay can block nav clicks - use force=True or close modal before navigating. PIN inputs: register form has 8 inputs (4 PIN + 4 confirm), login forms have 4 inputs.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. Minor HTML validation warnings are cosmetic and don't affect functionality.
